headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). MUST NOT use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, data tables, and generic UI text.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing, gap-4 to gap-6 for grids. Containers use p-4 or p-6.
layout.shadows: Ambient subtle shadows on hover for cards: shadow-md. Default state has shadow-sm or no shadow.

hero_header.style: Vivid red background (#CC0000). Overlay text must be white for contrast. Use abstract red background image with black/20 overlay.
hero_header.layout: Flexbox, distinct personalized greeting and quick stats.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border. High density data. Do not overuse shadows.

tabs.style: Horizontal scrollable tabs or inline flex tabs with sharp indicator. Active state uses primary red.

data_viz.style: Circular progress for MY SCORE. High contrast colors.

images.description: Abstract red background for the hero section.
Avatar for active user or leaderboard top 1.
Modern office building for announcements section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js/.jsx extensions for all React components. Do NOT use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex/grid layouts, use Shadcn selectively for interactive UI like Tabs and Dialogs.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the 'ALL APPLICATIONS' section (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) to maintain strict hierarchy.
For the hero header, ensure the #CC0000 background has sufficient contrast with the text. Add a subtle dark gradient overlay if using the provided background image.
Avoid excessive shadows; rely on 1px borders and distinct padding/margins.
Ensure the design remains responsive, particularly managing table/grid flows on mobile.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing. Use kebab-case and role-based names (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' and use it for dashboard icons.
Never use generic placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the images provided in this JSON.
accessibility: All interactive elements MUST have visible focus states.
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA/WCAG standards, especially white text on red background.
Include ARIA labels for icon buttons and visually hidden text where appropriate.
